title: Carbink Gemstone Variations
description: Carbink variations! All based on different Minecraft ores.
body:
### This Resource/Data Pack adds in extra variations of Carbink for you to adventure with in your Cobblemon world!

It adds forms for every single vanilla ore in minecraft, which you can rarely find in the wild around the ore associated with it, or evolve a carbink into it. However, you may need a Silk Touch pickaxe first!

### Carbink Forms in this pack:

Coalbink - Use Coal Ore Block on Carbink

Irbink - Use Iron Ore Block on Carbink

Golbink - Use Gold Ore Block on Carbink

Dibink - Use Diamond Ore Block on Carbink

Coppink - Use Copper Ore Block on Carbink

Labink - Use Lapis Ore Block on Carbink

Rubink - Use Redstone Ore Block on Carbink

Emebink - Use Emerald Ore Block on Carbink

### And some extra special evolutions that can't be found in the wild:

Amebink - Use Amethyst Cluster on Carbink

Netherbink - Use Nether Gold Ore OR Gilded Blackstone on Carbink

Quarbink - Use Nether Quartz Ore Block on Carbink

Shiny forms are based on deepslate ores, and deepslate ores can also be used to evolve them! The Nether-based shinies are based on guilded blackstone.

All are emissive!

### How to use:
1. Download (Unzipping Not Required)
2. Copy file into your Resource Packs and Data Packs folders (Don't forget to add it to your world saves folder too!)
3. Enable Resource Pack upon entering the world via the settings

Note: When enabling  the resource pack, the game might flag the add-on as outdated. Ignore it and proceed, as it still works fine!

### Cobblemon is required to use this mod!

This is a collab between KuukiKookie and Nimbosaur!
